metadata.releaseNotes:
1) Stock's Fundamental Score.
2) General Enhancements.
3) Bug Fixes.
metadata.description:
StockEdge is a stock market app best suited for Swing Traders, Momentum Investors, and Long-Term Investors. Access NSE, BSE data, Stock analysis tools, stock screeners, sector and industry-level analytics. The app also provides a personalized investment dashboard for portfolio tracking and a comprehensive mutual fund section.


Market Dashboard

• Indices: Track performance of Nifty 50, Bank Nifty, Sensex, Nifty IT, Nifty Pharma, Nifty Metal, and all other market indices from NSE and BSE.

•Trending Stocks: Monitor daily top gainers, top losers, high-volume stocks, 52-week high-low, and all-time high-low stocks, with price updates every minute.

• News: Stay informed with stock market news, updates on sectors, industries, and stocks.

• FII-DII Activity: Analyze FII-DII data in cash, futures, options.

• Deals: Track bulk deals, block deals, insider and SAST deals.

• Market Events: Stay updated on corporate actions, results, bonus issues, dividends, stock splits, and more.

• Sectors:

reviews.author: PKSPuneet
reviews.title: Privacy issues with Stockedge
reviews.content: The privacy issues with @mystockedge and @vivbajaj are extremely concerning. As soon as you begin using the app, you're bombarded with relentless calls, SMS, WhatsApp messages, and emails. I was considering their plan, but their aggressive tactics—worse than even Bajaj Finance—made me reconsider. Such shady business practices should be avoided at all costs. People need to be aware of this harassment and stay away from such fraudulent behavior. The company blatantly violates privacy norms, misusing personal data without any safeguards. Dear Apple AppStore this is a serious violation that needs investigation.

reviews.author: SaurShar
reviews.title: No need to Play Club
reviews.content:
Club is too much faff available in Rs. 200 apps elsewhere. 
They are happy marketing it saying you’ll be treated well but not even Vivek responds to queries. And none else have any idea! 
Badly trained teams! Careless to customer service. 
The app carries too much data with no head or tail. It’s essentially the market itself. 
Given my work schedule, I find extremely limited use of so much information. Seems like a big waste of money currently unless someone tells where to start n figure things out. 
Their well meaning delight officers also try n share the same information that one can already see. 
I believe now, I was much better off watching Vivek’s videos that was a wonderful experience which prompted me to take the subscription.

reviews.author: Abhishek Kr Tyagi
reviews.title: Feeling like I have been Cheated
reviews.content: I have subscribed this app on 17 Apr 2024 for one year.  During subscription, a person from stock edge call centre was with me on call.  He had shown me a demo of one of their trading strategies.  I asked him about the time of updating their strategy on the app.  He told me that they use to update their selection of stocks under various strategy by evening on daily basis.  Then I asked that which evening, is it after markets closed.  He said no, the evening of previous day of trading day I.e. of T-1 day because it will have no meaning if we update it after trades happened.  But now, I am checking since last two days, it is being updated after market is closed and all the moves already passed.  Hence, I am feeling that I have been cheated by them just to make money through subscription.  It was not a big amount but it was my hard earned money.  So I am sure that it will not benefit them but I will not be surprised if I see this app going.  Thanks to give me a realisation that I am a foo

reviews.author: AnuReview
reviews.title: Good features but horrible app
reviews.content:
The app has great interface and features. The only problem I had with the app was that it does not allow you to have 2 entries of the same stock purchased on 2 different dates at the see price of that day.
The major problem with the app is that it keeps logging you out constantly. Doesn’t let you log in. Keeps saying credentials are wrong. When you click on forgot password, they don’t send the password reset link on registered email id. I had already made accounts twice and had patiently filled up all my data but now again it has signed me out and refuses to let me sign in. 
Won’t be making another account and neither will I recommend this app to anyone.

reviews.author: Eskay28
reviews.title: Unethical people
reviews.content: Money minded people, no ethics. I’m subscriber to this app since 2 years. While renewing they assured they will give support during live market session through telegram. Unfortunately after renewal without any notice they shifted from telegram to their own web based platform. In web based platform every time you’ve to login with user ID, PW. you’ll not get popup messages like telegram app. Even after repeated request they refused to support via telegram. I lost interest on this app, because of negative response. Lost almost 24k which paid for subscriptions & not made any money with this app. They  went on postponing my refund request till expiry of subscription & now refused to renew or refund quoting the reason ur subscription expired. Very unethical people. When u raise grievance every alternate day you will get call from different person to make u frustration.

reviews.author: sksg2549
reviews.title: Not the best!
reviews.content:
First of all appreciate what you are building up with stock edge and learning community.

I like the app, but it has challenges.

1) It does not integrate portfolio from other brokers smoothly (where you have tie up) you have to try twice. On 2nd time or third time it updates. In the first time, it just show processed but stocks don’t update.

2) the trading ( buy/sell) is not smooth from the app where it takes you to my brokerage account. Again, API issues, screen gets hung when I try.

3) It’s not connected with multiple brokers like ICiCi and other full service institutions.

4)  Couple of features you can add like market movers, multi-baggers, most bought, with filters of large cap, mid cap, nifty etc like you have in app Ind Money. It’s not copying but a value add. 

5) Would like to use the club subscription but I want to have a feature where you have score against each stock with suggestions / hint of buy sell for example market mojo etc

6) Can we have stock of the week or stoc

reviews.title: One stop stock solution!
reviews.content:
I like this app. Before I have to google everything for any company data to investing in it but this app save so much time. Stock edge is really an edge of advantage. You can save your portfolio and more features in it.
Perhaps I hate adds that why I giving 4**** otherwise I would give 5 out of 5.

reviews.author: Abh apple
reviews.title: Lot of improvement, long way to go
reviews.content:
There is lot of information added and developer is doing great job.
Same time there is need for Checks. For e.g. in Fundamentals-Stocks default view should be fixed either on Standalone or Consolidated, Many companies have only standalone (in past results) while it has switching tab on main fundamental page.
Thus need Checks.

reviews.author: harsh6009
reviews.title: Powerful and simple
reviews.content: Very powerful yet simple app with loads of features at fingertips.

reviews.author: newdevu
reviews.title: In a simple word....SUPERB
reviews.content:
What an app....
and what can you expect from any stock research organisation....

and that’s it...just browse through the app and you will find all the details regarding every aspects of a company in such a beautiful and organised manner that can be easily understood by any newely or experienced player of the market.....

Just like a crafted by one of the best craftsman of an industry.....
Thanks to developers and its team for giving access to such valuable information.....

reviews.author: deeparsh
reviews.title: StockEdge
reviews.content: Hi. Have been using app for some time. It’s a beautifully conceived app for Indian stock market with tremendous scope and potential. A desktop version with utility addition like  notes taking, integration with other apps like Apple Notes or Evernote, colour coding for different watch lists, etc wish list could be long. But first on that would be a Mac version. An stock app fully integrated and synced across mobile, tablet and Mac would be a dream come true.

reviews.author: New India’s App
reviews.title: All at one place
reviews.content: I have been using this app for over an year now and a bit late to write the review. This app provides all of the investing as well as trading portfolio at one place, and the best part is that it now synchronises with your demat account directly, so you don’t have to enter The transaction manually.

reviews.author: nirajju
reviews.title: StockEdge has the “edge” and peerless
reviews.content:
I’ve been using StockEdge for the past 5–6 years, both on the app and the web, and it’s been a wonderful experience. The features are powerful and well-designed, and what impresses me most is how quickly bugs are fixed and improvements are rolled out—often without us even noticing the work going on behind the scenes.

The app has come a long way, and the progress is clearly forward and consistent. Kudos to the StockEdge team for continuously improving and maintaining such a high standard. Keep up the great work!

reviews.author: Vinayak Tiwari
reviews.title: Feed back and acknowledgement of reliable data source for investment and informed Decision
reviews.content: We appreciate the utility and transparency offered by this application and look forward to relying on it as a credible source in our ongoing and future investment activities as data are fetched from reliable sources such as MCA AND SEBI.
